title: humularia callensii
intro: Humularia callensii, also known as the 'African blue lilyturf', is a species of flowering plant in the family Colchicaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in West Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Humularia callensii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use in wound healing and as an antidote for snake bites. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
